strap: Derry Life Sciences draws £522m of UKRI lead-led funding across 673 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (41%), Royal Victoria Hospital (10%). 5 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £104m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Extracting without reinvesting" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
